dateTime: Saturday, June 13, 2026 — Shows at 10:00 AM, 2:00 PM, and 6:00 PM
venue: Daniel Boone Performing Arts Center, Birdsboro, PA

seniors.name: Emma Thompson
seniors.quote: Next Step gave me more than dance — it gave me a second family and the confidence to keep going.

seniors.name: Sophia Martinez
seniors.quote: Every class, every rehearsal, every performance has shaped who I am. I will carry this with me always.

seniors.name: Avery Johnson
seniors.quote: Dancing here taught me that hard work and heart can take you anywhere.

seniors.name: Grace Chen
seniors.quote: Miss Missy always believed in me even when I didn't believe in myself. I am so grateful for every year.

seniors.name: Lily Parker
seniors.quote: The stage feels like home. I will miss this place more than words can say.
